title: ophrys mammosa subsp. leucophthalma
intro: Ophrys mammosa subsp. leucophthalma, also known as the white-flowered Ophrys or Mediterranean bee orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its unique appearance and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ophrys mammosa subsp. leucophthalma include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to promote healing and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
